ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: wheat flakes (75%) ( wheat , sugar,  barley  malt extract, salt, pantothenic acid), raisins (17%), toasted coconut chips (3,5%), sweetened dried banana slices (2,5%) (bananas, coconut oil, sugar, flavouring),  hazelnuts  (0,5%), dried apple (0,5%)
